title: About the 3000 words
subtitle: Longman Communication 3000 — what it is and why it matters
en:
The Longman Communication 3000 is a list of the 3000 most frequent words in both spoken and written English, based on statistical analysis of the 390 million words contained in the Longman Corpus Network — a group of corpuses or databases of authentic English language. The Longman Communication 3000 represents the core of the English language and shows students of English which words are the most important for them to learn and study in order to communicate effectively in both speech and writing.

Analysis of the Longman Corpus Network shows that these 3000 most frequent words in spoken and written English account for 86% of the language. This means that by knowing this list of words, a learner of English is in a position to understand 86% or more of what he or she reads. Of course, 'knowing' a word involves more than simply being able to recognise it and know a main meaning of it. Many of the most frequent words have a range of different meanings, a variety of different grammatical patterns, and numerous significant collocations. Nonetheless, a basic understanding of the Longman Communication 3000 is a very powerful tool and will help students develop good comprehension and communication skills in English.

— Jeremy Harmer, ELT author

To ensure that users have access to the appropriate information, the Longman Dictionary of Contemporary English marks all the words in the Longman Communication 3000 in red accompanied by special symbols: W1, W2, and W3 for words that are in the top 1000, 2000 and 3000 most frequent words in written English, and S1, S2 and S3 for the top 1000, 2000 and 3000 most frequent words in spoken English. Longman dictionaries are the only ones to highlight the differences between spoken and written frequency.

These frequency markers give users access to a wealth of information that can help the selection of the appropriate word or phrase in a variety of situations. Not only are the words and meanings given descriptive labels (for example formal or informal, AmE or BrE, humorous, old-fashioned), but now they have the added information about relative frequency in spoken and written language.
zh:
朗文交际 3000 词（Longman Communication 3000）是一份涵盖英语口语和书面语中最常见的 3000 个词的列表。它基于对「朗文语料库网络」（一个由真实英语语料组成的数据库群）中 3.9 亿词的统计分析得出。朗文交际 3000 词代表了英语的核心，它告诉英语学习者哪些词是最重要的，是他们在口语和书面交流中需要优先学习和掌握的。

对朗文语料库网络的分析显示，这 3000 个最常见的英语口语和书面语词汇覆盖了 86% 的语言使用。这意味着，掌握了这份词汇表，英语学习者就能读懂 86% 以上的英语内容。当然，「掌握」一个词不仅仅是能认出它、知道它的主要意思。许多最常见的词有多个不同的含义、多种语法搭配和大量固定搭配。不过，对朗文交际 3000 词有一个基本的了解，本身就是一个非常强大的工具，能帮助学习者培养良好的英语理解能力和沟通能力。

— Jeremy Harmer（杰里米·哈默），英语教学专家

为了让使用者能获得准确的信息，《朗文当代英语词典》把朗文交际 3000 词表中的所有词都用红色标出，并配以特殊符号：W1、W2、W3 表示该词属于书面英语中最常见的 1000、2000、3000 词；S1、S2、S3 则表示该词属于口语中最常见的 1000、2000、3000 词。朗文词典是唯一区分口语和书面语使用频率的词典。

这些频率标记为使用者提供了丰富的信息，能帮助他们在不同场合选择合适的词或短语。这些词和释义不仅有诸如「正式/非正式」「美式/英式」「幽默/过时」之类的描述性标签，还新增了关于口语和书面语相对使用频率的信息。
